title: Slow Motion Hands
subtitle: Move your hands like they’re floating in water.

steps.text: Hold your hands in front of you and look at them closely.
steps.hint: Pretend time is moving extra slow.

steps.text: Lift one hand up very slowly, like it’s moving through thick water.
steps.hint: Go slower than you think you need to.

steps.text: Now switch hands. Move the other one just as slowly.
Move both hands together in slow motion for one deep breath.
steps.hint: Your whole body can slow down with your hands.
